addon:addon.name: Xiaomi Wifi devices (Mi IO) Binding
addon:addon.description: Binding for Xiaomi wifi devices (Mi IO protocol) which are normally controlled by the mihome app like Mi Robot Vacuums, Yeelights, Humidifiers, Fans etc.

parameter.name: username
parameter.label: Xiaomi cloud username
parameter.description: Deprecated: configure via the Cloud Connector thing instead. Xiaomi cloud username. Typically your email

parameter.name: password
parameter.label: Xiaomi cloud password
parameter.description: Deprecated: configure via the Cloud Connector thing instead.
